channel.title: United Kingdom on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in United Kingdom on Alien Truth Social

item.title: British UFO Research Association
item.description:
The British UFO Research Association (BUFORA) is a UK-based organization founded in 1964 to investigate reported UFO phenomena. The group conducts regular investigations and manages witness support services, reporting that approximately 95% of the cases they review are identified as hoaxes. Throughout its history, the association has faced controversy, including instances where it mistakenly validated fraudulent sightings and endorsed the 1995 film Alien Autopsy as authentic.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/British_UFO_Research_Association
